page_title: List of blades (Attack on Titan 2 Game)
text:
Blades consist of the player's primary weapons in Attack on Titan 2. They are rated by Sharpness (the damage they do), Blade Length (how far away a player can attack), and Durability (how many attacks can be made before they must be replaced).

Blades can be further fortified for additional Sharpness and Durability.

Trivia

The blade with the highest Sharpness is the Explosive Skysplitter Gunblade with a base Sharpness of 1070.
The blade with the highest Blade Length is a tie between the Tiger Zero and Heat Sword blade lineages with a Blade Length of 200.
The blade with the highest Durability is the Platinum Dolch with a base Durability of 1200.

Navigation
